column1: I (to read) customers’ reviews at 6.00 in the evening.
Eric (to play) World of Tanks at 7.00 p.m. tomorrow.
This time next week I (to have) dinner with Tiffany.
Tom (to wait) for you the whole day.
We (not to send) them the message in the morning tomorrow.
I (to have) dinner with my friends at the moment and I am very happy to see them again.
Get back! The bomb (to go) to explode.
